title: LIVING X VULKAN
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on Vulkan rendering, FPS boosting, smoother gameplay, and better optimization. Includes VulkanMod, Lithium, FerriteCore, Xaero’s Minimap, and useful quality-of-life improvements for better performance.
body:
# LIVING X VULKAN

A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on Vulkan rendering, FPS boosting, smoother gameplay, and better overall performance.

This modpack uses VulkanMod to replace the default OpenGL renderer with Vulkan, helping reduce lag and improve frame stability on supported GPUs. It also includes multiple optimization and utility mods for a faster and smoother Minecraft experience.

## Features

* Vulkan renderer support
* Better FPS and reduced stuttering
* Faster chunk loading and rendering
* Optimized memory and CPU usage
* Lightweight and performance-focused
* Useful quality-of-life improvements
* Xaero’s Minimap and World Map included
* Motion blur, zoom, armor HUD, and more

## Included Optimization Mods

* VulkanMod
* Lithium
* FerriteCore
* Entity Culling
* More Culling
* Dynamic FPS
* ModernFix
* Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
* Krypton
* Packet Fixer
* Fast Noise
* ScalableLux
* BadOptimizations

## Quality of Life Mods

* Xaero’s Minimap
* Xaero’s World Map
* WI Zoom
* Mouse Tweaks
* Shulker Box Tooltip
* Better Ping Display
* Mod Menu
* Continuity
* Brightness Plus
* Status Effect Timer
* Crosshair Indicator
* TipTapShow
* Freelook

## Important

* Requires Vulkan-supported GPU and drivers
* Vulkan API version 1.2 or higher is recommended
* Client-side focused modpack
* Fabric Loader required

This modpack is designed for players who want maximum performance while keeping Minecraft visually smooth and lightweight.

(you can remove motionreblur and if you don't want both motion blur mod you can also remove that both motion blur mod)
